where_to_eat.name: Grand Bazaar Food Section
where_to_eat.description: The food stalls in the Grand Bazaar offer reasonably priced meals compared to other tourist areas in Istanbul. While mentioned in context of Istanbul, food is a highlight in São Paulo's dining scene.

where_to_eat.name: Café Culture in São Paulo
where_to_eat.description: São Paulo has a vibrant café culture, though espresso drinks can be expensive (mentioned at 178 reais for café and pão de queijo). Known for quick, quality espresso service.

into_the_wild.name: Memorial da América Latina
into_the_wild.description: A massive cultural landmark where the north, west, and center zones of São Paulo meet. The site features Niemeyer architecture with large open concrete spaces, though it could benefit from more greenery and landscaping.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Avenida Paulista at Sunset
gram_worthy_spots.description: A stunning location for golden hour photography, offering beautiful sunset views that capture the essence of São Paulo's urban landscape.
